codeReview.summary: Policy engine implementation fully covers the required functionality: YAML policy loading, action evaluation against policies, and deny-first semantics. The implementation includes comprehensive test coverage (47 policy-related tests pass).

sharedStateObservations.observation: The PolicyCondition enum uses a duplicate type alias PolicyConditionAlt to support two YAML formats. This dual-type approach may cause confusion - the codebase has both PolicyCondition and PolicyConditionAlt which serve similar purposes. This pattern is not documented in AGENTS.md.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: policy.rs:54-195 defines both PolicyCondition and PolicyConditionAlt with nearly identical variants but different YAML serialization formats

sharedStateObservations.observation: The policy.rs implementation includes regex pattern pre-compilation for performance but this is an internal optimization not documented in any research documents. The regex compilation cache (compiled_patterns HashMap) could be a memory concern if policies have many regex patterns.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: policy.rs:289-326 - regex patterns are compiled and cached on load, but there's no bounded cache or limit on pattern count

summary: Policy engine feature passes review. Implementation correctly loads YAML policies, evaluates actions against them with deny-first semantics (deny takes precedence over allow), supports priority ordering, multi-condition AND logic, and default effects. All 47 policy tests pass.
